column5:
Key headings: Your customers expect great delivery. We make sure they get it.
Subheading: From the moment an order is placed to the moment it lands at your customer's door, ITD Global handles the carriers, the labels and the returns so you can focus on running your store.
Key points: Access to competitive delivery rates across 85+ carriers, next-day, tracked and economy options so you can offer customers the choices they expect at checkout. Returns handled end to end with an online portal so customers can self-serve and your team does not have to manage it manually. Local depot network in Manchester, Birmingham and London one drop, all carriers. Selling internationally? Ship to X+ countries with customs documentation handled automatically so cross-border growth does not create extra admin. Integrates directly with Shopify, WooCommerce, Amazon, eBay and more.
CTA: Get Started.

Internal links: /integrations, /solutions/international.
